daily_plan_req: At 9:00, walk to Agent Academy:academy.classroom for the startup standup. After the standup, move to a suitable work spot and focus on the money-making objective.

currently: Amara is working with the startup team to generate real-world money safely, and tracks points, real revenue evidence, costs, and survival pressure so the team feels the stakes.
